parameters.textBody: =Sorry, something went wrong on our end. Please send your message again 🙏

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.OLLAMA_MODEL, stream: false, format: 'json', options: { temperature: 0.1 }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $json.aiSystemPrompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.aiUserMessage } ] }) }}

parameters.textBody:
=Hi {{$json.name}} 👋 Welcome! You can:
- Ask about our menu or order food (e.g. "2 Burgers and 1 Pizza S")
- Ask a question (delivery charges, timing, location)
- Check an order status (e.g. "status ORD-123456")

How can I help you today?

=Sorry, some items are not available: {{$json.invalidItems.join(', ')}}.
Please check the menu and try again, or reply "menu" to see today's items.

nodes.name: Save Address And Create Order ID

parameters.subject: =New Order {{$json.session.OrderID}}

parameters.textBody: =No problem, your order has been cancelled. Message us anytime to start a new order! 🙏
=Sorry, I didn't catch that. Please reply YES to confirm your order or NO to cancel.
